zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barry 9th Barrymore於1435年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克時，他的父親William Barry 8th Lord Barry38歲，母親Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore38歲。他於1469年與Sheely MacCarthy在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1486年12月25日在愛爾蘭享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barry 9th Barrymore于1435年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克时，他的父亲William Barry 8th Lord Barry38岁，母亲Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore38岁。他于1469年与Sheely MacCarthy在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1486年12月25日在爱尔兰享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Barry 9th Barrymore was born in 1435, in County Cork, Ireland, his father, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, was 38 and his mother, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, was 38. He married Sheely MacCarthy in 1469, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died on 25 December 1486, in Ireland, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barry 9th Barrymore est né en 1435, à County Cork, Irlande, son père, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Sheely MacCarthy en 1469, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1486, à Irlande, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barry 9th Barrymore 1435 in County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Barry 8th Lord Barry 38 und seine Mutter Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore 38. Er hat 1469 in Irland Sheely MacCarthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1486 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barry 9th Barrymore è nato il nel 1435 nel County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Sheely MacCarthy nel 1469, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì il 25 dicembre 1486, nel Irlanda, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barry 9th Barrymoreが1435年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクで生まれた時，父William Barry 8th Lord Barryは38歳，母Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymoreは38歳であった。1469年にアイルランドでSheely MacCarthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1486年12月25日にアイルランドで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barry 9th Barrymore(이)가 1435년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Barry 8th Lord Barry(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1469년 아일랜드에서 Sheely MacCarthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1486년 12월 25일 아일랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barry 9th Barrymore nasceu em 1435, em County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Sheely MacCarthy em 1469, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1486, em Irlanda, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barry 9th Barrymore родился в 1435 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени William Barry 8th Lord Barry было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Sheely MacCarthy в 1469 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер 25 декабря 1486 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Barry 9th Barrymore nació en 1435, en County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sheely MacCarthy en 1469, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1486, en Irlanda, a la edad de 51 años.
